name: Puget Sound Refinery
description_short: Puget Sound Refinery Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative offering deposit accounts, mortgages, HELOCs, and consumer banking services with NCUA insurance protection.
description_long:
Puget Sound Refinery Federal Credit Union (PSRFCU) is a federally chartered credit union serving members in the Puget Sound region. The institution has a primary employer affiliation with HF Sinclair but accepts membership from the broader community. Like all credit unions, it operates on a cooperative member-ownership model rather than as a for-profit entity.

PSRFCU offers a range of deposit accounts including share savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), Christmas Club accounts, and youth-focused savings products. They provide online and mobile banking through their app with 24-hour approval for first-time deposits. The credit union has expanded into mortgage lending and home equity lines of credit (HELOCs), and now offers free appraisals up to $800 with mortgage applications. Additional services include payroll deduction, direct deposit setup, ACH transfers, debit cards with fraud protection, and a new fraud alert system via text, email, and phone calls.

Distinguishing features include competitive rates on specific products—notably 3.5% APY on Christmas Club accounts (up to $10,000) and 7.75% APY on youth Super Saver accounts with modest minimums ($500-$1,000). The credit union emphasizes member safety through NCUA federal insurance coverage up to $250,000 on deposit accounts. They also run member incentive programs, annual scholarships, and maintain a community presence with annual meetings and newsletters.

As a credit union, PSRFCU operates with constraints typical to the sector: membership eligibility may be limited (employer-based or community-based), product variety is narrower than large national banks, and rates/terms are subject to board discretion. The website provides limited detail on personal loan products, credit cards, or comprehensive fee structures, suggesting a focus on core deposit and mortgage services rather than full-service consumer lending.
services: Share (Savings) Accounts with quarterly dividend payments
Christmas Club Accounts with 3.5% APY and automatic monthly deposits
Youth Early Super Savers Accounts earning 1% above Prime Rate
Home Mortgages with free appraisals up to $800
Mobile banking app with 24-hour deposit approval
Payroll deduction and direct deposit setup
Debit cards with 24/7 fraud prevention and live fraud alerts
pros: NCUA federal insurance protection on all deposit accounts up to $250,000
Competitive 7.75% APY on youth Super Saver accounts with low $500 minimum
3.5% APY on Christmas Club accounts—higher than typical savings rates
24-hour first-time approval for deposits through mobile app
Free mortgage appraisals up to $800 credited at loan closing
New fraud alert system with live text, email, and call notifications
Member-owned cooperative structure eliminates profit-driven fee pressure
cons: Limited public information on personal loan products, APRs, or credit card offerings
Membership eligibility may be restricted (employer affiliation with HF Sinclair unclear for non-employees)
Website does not disclose complete fee schedule or overdraft policies in content provided
Youth Super Saver account capped at $1,000 maximum balance—excess transferred to regular savings
No mention of business banking, investment services, or wealth management products
best_for: HF Sinclair employees and family members seeking employer-affiliated banking
Parents and guardians saving for children's education and financial literacy
Homebuyers in the Puget Sound region seeking competitive mortgage rates and free appraisals
diagnosis: Puget Sound Refinery FCU is best suited for employees of HF Sinclair, families seeking youth savings products with competitive rates, and Puget Sound-area homebuyers. The main caveat is that membership eligibility and full product availability are not clearly detailed online—prospective members should contact the credit union directly to confirm eligibility and review complete fee schedules and loan terms.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Puget Sound Refinery — NCUA-insured credit union in Anacortes, WA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
